description: An auditor tests a sample of expense reports to ensure they were properly approved according to policy.

nodes.task_description: Obtain a data dump of all expense reports submitted in the last quarter.

expected_outcome.expected: Auditor receives a complete dataset of expense reports.

nodes.task_description: Select a random sample of 50 expense reports over $1,000.

expected_outcome.expected: A statistically valid sample is selected for testing.

nodes.task_description: For each sampled report, verify that the approver was the employee's direct manager or higher, as required by policy.

expected_outcome.expected: Auditor finds 3 instances where an employee's peer approved the report, noting them as exceptions.
